meta.generated_from: dev-flow-plan A.1.5 — 5-agent recon workflow (wf_367b616f, 2026-07-23) + live factory_psql checks + plan-lint budget math

symbols.type_text: (body: object, fixups: string[]) => object — currently only 'bonsai-system-role-fixup' (role rewrite + WRONG '[system] ' prefix); Fix 2 (billing-header) missing
step1 exact match, step2 per-backend modelAliases[requestedId], step3 SILENT first-healthy-any-model fallback (to be gated behind LLM_PROXY_LOOSE_FALLBACK=1)

symbols.signature: probe every 30s: GET {baseUrl}/models timeout 2500ms; failure -> healthy=false + 15s backoff; lmstudio also {host}/api/v0/models
env LLM_PROXY_BACKENDS_JSON (test) | factory_psql SELECT name,kind,base_url,api_key_env,enabled,priority,fixups,model_aliases FROM tickets.llm_proxy_backends WHERE enabled ORDER BY priority
symbols.type_text: poll 30s; on failure keep last-known-good cache (add degraded flag)

symbols.signature: GET /health (liveness) | GET /v1/models (union healthy) | GET /admin/state | POST /admin/reload | POST /v1/* (fixups+resolve, SSE via Readable.fromWeb); headers x-llm-proxy-backend, x-llm-proxy-served-model; port env LLM_PROXY_PORT default 18235, binds 127.0.0.1

symbols.type_text: {provider: string, modelId: string, baseUrl: string} — passed as {model: FACTORY_MODEL} at ~25 call sites; make env-driven, keep call sites untouched

symbols.signature: lines 22-26: tier=opus -> ternary-bonsai-27b @ http://127.0.0.1:18235 (bypasses DB); lines 76-77: emergency fallback lmstudio qwythos-9b-v2 @ 127.0.0.1:1234
symbols.type_text: resolve {provider,modelId,baseUrl,slotId} from tickets.provider_config/factory_model_slots with claim/circuit-breaker in tickets.provider_health

symbols.signature: lines 44-124: iterate prep-JSON .launch[]; lines 56-61 budget-guard.sh call (health gate goes immediately BEFORE this); then background claude -p in ticket worktree
symbols.type_text: bash loop; env from autopilot.env already sourced by wakeup.sh

symbols.signature: lines 33-38: set -a source ~/.config/factory/autopilot.env; lines 70-83: read+log+delete force-tick flag (audit only); lines 120-179 prep chain; RETICK_DELAY=5s idle loop

lines 20-47: UPDATE tickets SET status='plan_staged', slot_count; INSERT ticket_comment FACTORY-PLAN-REF; INSERT factory_phase_events scout/design/plan done. Wake trigger goes after line 47 before final echo
admin-only (session+isAdmin, lines 8-22) -> writeControl('force-tick-requested', ISOts, username) upsert into tickets.factory_control (brand IS NULL)
symbols.type_text: flag is currently write-only telemetry; forcetick timer makes it real — route itself stays unchanged

db_tables.notes: EXISTS + seeded (verified 2026-07-23): llamacpp-bonsai http://127.0.0.1:8093/v1 prio 1, lmstudio http://127.0.0.1:1234/v1 prio 2, deepseek prio 90, opencode-zen prio 91. D5 adds model_aliases {"ternary-bonsai":"*"} on llamacpp-bonsai.
Live rows (verified): implement|llamacpp|ternary-bonsai-27b|http://127.0.0.1:18235, plan|ternary-bonsai-27b|..., verify|llamacpp|... — model_id stale, migrate to 'ternary-bonsai'.

Enabled rows all :18235 with stale model_id ternary-bonsai-27b (tiers sonnet/haiku/coaching/cheap/flash) + one 'anthropic|m||opus' row with empty base_url. Migration renames model_id/provider values ternary-bonsai-27b -> ternary-bonsai.
force-tick-requested flag (brand IS NULL); wakeup.sh reads+logs+deletes; forcetick-poll.sh SELECTs it (read-only) to decide systemctl start.

api_contracts.notes: admin session guard; writeControl upsert. Unchanged by this change — becomes effective via factory-forcetick.timer.
Existing T002081 admin API over llm_proxy_backends — unchanged; GUI panel reads it.

api_contracts.route: Gateway :18235 — GET /health (liveness), GET /healthz (NEW aggregated: 200 iff >=1 healthy backend; body {healthy_backends,total_backends,registry_poll_age_s,degraded}), GET /v1/models, GET /admin/state, POST /admin/reload, POST /v1/*
api_contracts.notes: Response headers x-llm-proxy-backend / x-llm-proxy-served-model on proxied calls.

risks.note: recon host-state subagent returned a placeholder result; its facts (port owner PID 396, no ~/.local/state/llm-proxy, autopilot.env contents) were independently confirmed by the other three recon agents and direct DB queries
scripts/factory/pipeline.mjs is on the s1.ignore list (sanctioned monolith, T000460) — budget shown as 0/ungated; keep the diff to the FACTORY_MODEL constant block only
~/.config/factory/autopilot.env and ~/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc are HOST files (not repo-tracked) — their updates are cutover-runbook steps printed by cutover.sh, not repo diffs
intel gathered via grep/recon-subagents, not codebase-memory graph (JS/bash scripts are thin; signatures verified by direct reads)
